summary: Plan is well-structured and aligns with the existing codebase. LoopDeps extension with optional fields is consistent with the current pattern. Minor refinements suggested but nothing blocking.

issues.description: `getPointCount` getter is unnecessary — `d.quality?.maxPoints` is already available in the render loop. Remove the extra indirection.
issues.suggestion: Drop `getPointCount` from LoopDeps; use `d.quality?.maxPoints ?? 0` directly in the onDebugFrame call.

issues.description: Plan step 4 says to set getModeName after modeManager creation inside geoPromise.then(), but the modes array is a local const in that closure. The closure must capture the array reference for the getter.
issues.suggestion: Capture `const modeEntries = [{ name: 'particles', ... }, ...]` before createModeManager so `getModeName` can reference `modeEntries[modeManager.activeIndex].name`.

issues.description: Test naming should follow existing convention: `describe('US-038: ...')` and `it('T-038-XX: ...')` as seen in other test files.
issues.suggestion: Use the established ticket-prefixed naming pattern.

recommendations: The render loop already computes smoothed `bass` and `treble` as local variables plus `fps` from delta — all values needed for onDebugFrame are readily available at the call site with no extra work.
Consider using `requestAnimationFrame` timestamp diff for FPS rather than the existing delta, since delta already exists and `1000/delta` is exactly right.
The plan correctly places z-index: 30 above the info overlay (z-index: 20) and buttons (z-index: 10), which is appropriate for a developer tool.
